name: Focus Integrity Standard
application_rule: Governs structural reasoning about focus only, never clinical assessment of an individual. Anatomy-layer application requires the educational-reference disclaimer and forbids diagnostic phrasing.

criteria.name: Suspension
criteria.statement: The structures holding the focal element are identified and stable.

criteria.name: Accommodation
criteria.statement: The system adjusts focus across its intended operating range.

criteria.name: Separation
criteria.statement: The system separates signal from noise within stated tolerances.

criteria.name: Provenance
criteria.statement: The system can establish the origin or authenticity of what it sees to a stated confidence.

criteria.name: Interpretation
criteria.statement: Held, clean focus yields correct interpretation, not merely sharp signal.
